129 reviews for Noise Master Buds

  1. Rated 5 out of 5

    Rahul Mehra (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The Bose tuning is clearly visible in the soundstage. Very balanced and crisp. The adaptive ANC works like a charm in traffic.

  2. Rated 4 out of 5

    Sandeep Singh (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The delivery was delayed a lot by the courier guy, took almost 6 days, but I received the product at the end safely. Earbuds are mindblowing. Bass is deep without distorting vocals.

  3. Rated 3 out of 5

    Naveen P. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Audio quality is nice but the 49dB ANC is too strong for me, it creates a cabin pressure feeling in my ears giving me a slight headache.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Naveen,

    We apologize for the discomfort. The Adaptive ANC is very powerful, but you can easily reduce its intensity! Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com and our product expert will guide you on how to switch to "Mild ANC" mode via the companion app.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  4. Rated 5 out of 5

    Amit Joshi (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Bhai kya mast sound hai iska. Bose likha hai toh quality toh hogi hi. Spatial audio ekdam theatre jaisa lagta hai movies dekhte time.

  5. Rated 4 out of 5

    Prakash Raj (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Product is good but dual pairing takes around 3-4 seconds to switch between my laptop and mobile. Need firmware update to make it faster.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Prakash,

    We have acknowledged your query regarding the switching delay. We are actively working on optimizing the multipoint Bluetooth protocol and will try rolling out a firmware update soon to make this transition seamless.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  6. Rated 2 out of 5

    Saurabh K. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Sound is great but I have initiated a replacement because the left earbud is draining battery in just 45 minutes. Waiting for the pickup.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Saurabh,

    We really apologize for the inconvenience caused by the defective battery. You need not worry, your replacement has been approved. Your brand new sealed product will be delivered to you at the time of pickup.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  7. Rated 5 out of 5

    Aditya Sharma (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Here is my own review for this product: what I found. Initially left earbud had syncing issues and the normal customer support agent did not respond properly on chat. Then I checked the support link and found the head contact mobile number. Upon contacting them later, the issue was solved in 5 minutes via a hard reset guide. Really appreciate the escalation support. The buds themselves are fantastic.
